allowed_imports: official Python.org Android archive identified by the product lock
LA-2 source copied from the accepted UT-2 evidence with recorded identity
LR-3 relative RUNPATH algorithm copied as bounded product code
selected sysconfig normalization behavior from accepted UT-3 evidence
selected three-root policy from accepted UT-4 evidence
focused semantic tests and deterministic archive tooling
artifact_flow: full is the sole assembly authority; install_only is a mechanical projection of full; install_only_stripped is derived only from install_only
forbidden_runtime_or_build_dependencies: Termux native libraries or Termux prefix identity
project-built OpenSSL, SQLite, libffi, xz, bzip2, zlib, or other upstream dependency replacements
network Git or unpinned runtime acquisition
legacy_retention_policy: Existing Epoch 1/2 code and experiments remain evidence/history but are not imported by components/upstream-thin.
repository_flow: single append-only main; no feature branch is required for this program unless the owner explicitly changes the rule
